# Generated Code Repository

This repository contains auto-generated Go code from Protocol Buffer definitions.

**⚠️ DO NOT EDIT FILES MANUALLY**

All code is automatically generated by GitHub Actions from [proto-repo](https://github.com/Dan5365/proto-repo).

## Usage

```bash
go get github.com/Dan5365/generated-repo@latest
```

## Packages

- `github.com/Dan5365/generated-repo/payment` - Payment service client/server stubs
- `github.com/Dan5365/generated-repo/order` - Order service client/server stubs
